projectOrigin.notes: Project concept started ~June 2024. First confirmed ChefFlow prompt in ChatGPT: July 18, 2024. Current and final version (CFv1) initial commit: February 14, 2026.

restarts.note: Each entry represents a distinct restart — a new codebase, a new AI Studio submission, or a new major architectural attempt. The final version (CFv1) is NOT counted as a restart.

notes: First confirmed ChefFlow prompt in ChatGPT history is dated 2024-07-18.
Additional ChatGPT history evidence shows active ChefFlow work on 2025-11-13.
Most recent confirmed ChatGPT ChefFlow thread is dated 2026-02-28 (Today in screenshot).
ChatGPT threads include deep feature design, market research, real-world scenario planning, and detailed business process documentation.
Reconstructed multi-phase timeline narrative from ChatGPT screenshot packet was captured verbatim on 2026-02-28.
A second ChatGPT 'Founder Build Document' screenshot packet (technical + emotional reconstruction) was captured verbatim on 2026-02-28.
Archived Google AI Studio project variants and blueprint documents were captured as additional evidence of iteration-heavy effort on 2026-02-28.
Local filesystem archive scan on 2026-02-28 confirmed a major external graveyard rooted at C:\Users\david\Desktop\_ChefFlow_OLD, including BillyBob1-14 with 185,700 files and ~3.87 GB total size.
User reported roughly two years of restart cycles before regular commit cadence.
Tracked estimate blends VS Code session evidence with git commit session modeling.

trackedSinceTelemetry.method: VS Code log + telemetry extrapolation captured on 2026-02-28

preTelemetryRestartEra.method: Manual estimate for pre-telemetry restart cycles including extensive documentation, research, scenario-design work, and archived AI Studio iteration effort (user-reported + screenshot evidence)
